title: GeoSAM-3D: Geodesic Prompt Propagation for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Segmentation from Monocular Video
blurb: Promptable 3D scene segmentation from monocular video via heat-method geodesic propagation over Gaussian centroids.

title: Sat-Splat-Distort: Distortion-Aware Gaussian Splatting for Satellite RPC, Pushbroom, Fisheye, and 360 Cameras
blurb: Distortion-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting for satellite RPC, pushbroom, fisheye, and 360 cameras.

title: PhysFlow-Earth: Physics-Constrained Rectified Flow for Earth Observation Super-Resolution and Climate Downscaling
venue: In preparation. Target: NeurIPS 2026 Climate Change AI workshop
blurb: Physics-constrained rectified flow for Sentinel-2 super-resolution and ERA5/CHIRPS climate downscaling.

title: TrajPrompt: Open-Vocabulary Maritime Behavior Search with Trajectory Contrastive Learning, TGARD, and Satellite Confirmation
venue: In preparation. Target: NeurIPS 2026 Datasets and Benchmarks
blurb: Open-vocabulary maritime trajectory search: trajectory-CLIP and TGARD with SAM 2 over AIS tracks and satellite imagery.

title: DarkVesselNet: Multi-Modal Remote Sensing and Trajectory Reasoning for Dark Vessel Detection
venue: In preparation. Target: CVPR EarthVision 2027; xView3-SAR benchmark
blurb: Multi-modal dark-vessel detection fusing Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 optical, and AIS with TGARD and Pi-DPM anomaly reasoning.

title: Pin Infrastructure Service: A Constraint-First Microservice for Autonomous Ride-Hail Pickup and Drop-Off Selection
blurb: Production gRPC service for map-constrained pickup and drop-off pin selection in autonomous ride-hail.

title: MapFix-Spatial: Interactive Distortion-Aware Coordinate Correction with Deterministic and AI-Assisted Analysis
blurb: Distortion-aware geospatial coordinate correction with a deterministic engine and optional LLM-assisted analysis.

title: Physics-Informed Reinforcement Learning for Trajectory Generation and Reasoning
blurb: Physics-informed reinforcement learning with Group Relative Policy Optimization for trajectory generation and reasoning.

title: GeoTrace-Agent: A Production Multi-Agent Framework for Spatiotemporal Reasoning
blurb: Multi-agent framework for spatiotemporal reasoning with Haegerstrand space-time prisms, MCP tools, and A2A messaging.

title: Harbormaster: a production-shaped maritime anomaly platform under a $75/month cap
blurb: A solo-built, production-shaped maritime anomaly-detection platform on AWS: change-data-capture, streaming, a SageMaker promotion pipeline, and a drift-to-HITL-to-RL flywheel, under a hard cost cap and three layers of adversarial review.
